Bases: object

Parameters:

  • R_n (float)

  • R_d (float)

  • code (str)

R_n: float
R_d: float
code: str
femsolver.design.connections.bolts_welds.block_shear_aisc(*, A_gv, A_nv, A_nt, F_y, F_u, U_bs=1.0, phi=0.75)[source]

AISC 360 Eq. J4-5: Rn = 0.6 F_u A_nv + U_bs F_u A_nt <= 0.6 F_y A_gv + U_bs F_u A_nt.

Parameters:

  • A_gv (float)

  • A_nv (float)

  • A_nt (float)

  • F_y (float)

  • F_u (float)

  • U_bs (float)

  • phi (float)

Return type:

BlockShearResult

class femsolver.design.connections.bolts_welds.WeldStrengthResult(R_n_per_length: 'float', R_d_per_length: 'float', code: 'str')[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • R_n_per_length (float)

  • R_d_per_length (float)

  • code (str)

R_n_per_length: float
R_d_per_length: float
code: str
femsolver.design.connections.bolts_welds.fillet_weld_aisc(*, leg_size, F_EXX, phi=0.75)[source]

AISC 360 J2-4: Rn = 0.60 F_EXX t_e per unit length, with throat thickness t_e = 0.707 leg_size.

Parameters:

  • leg_size (float) – Fillet weld leg (m).

  • F_EXX (float) – Filler-metal nominal tensile strength (Pa).

  • phi (float)

Return type:

WeldStrengthResult

femsolver.design.connections.bolts_welds.fillet_weld_is800(*, leg_size, f_u_weld, gamma_mw=1.25)[source]

IS 800 Cl. 10.5.7: P_dw / l_w = f_u_w t_t / (sqrt(3) gamma_mw) per unit length, t_t = 0.7 leg_size.

Parameters:

  • leg_size (float)

  • f_u_weld (float)

  • gamma_mw (float)

Return type:

WeldStrengthResult

Reports

Design reports – HTML per-member + CSV summary.

The deliverable layer for Phase 29 (ACI 318 concrete) and Phase 30 (AISC 360 steel) designs. Consumes any of the result dataclasses from those phases (BeamDesignResult, ColumnDesignResult, SteelMemberCheck), converts them into a code-neutral MemberReportEntry, and emits:

  • a self-contained HTML report (no external CSS / JS) with one card per member containing demand, capacity, DCR, code clauses, and pass/fail status, suitable for review attachment;

  • a flat CSV summary with one row per member for whole-frame spreadsheet review.

No third-party templating engine – plain string concatenation, following the no-extra-dependencies house style.

class femsolver.design.reports.MemberReportEntry(member_tag, member_type, section_summary, material_summary, demands=<factory>, capacities=<factory>, dcrs=<factory>, governing_dcr=0.0, governing_check='', passes=True, code_refs=<factory>, notes='')[source]

Bases: object

Code-neutral per-member design entry, ready for reporting.

Variables:

  • member_tag (str) – Identifier for the member (e.g., "Beam L1-B1", "Col S2-C3").

  • member_type (str) – Free text describing the member type (e.g., "RC beam (ACI 318-19)", "Steel W14x90 (AISC 360-22)").

  • section_summary (str) – Geometric / section summary (e.g., "300 x 550 mm, 4 #7 bot + 3 #7 top, #3 stirrups @ 150 mm").

  • material_summary (str) – Material grades summary (e.g., "fc' = 28 MPa, fy = 420 MPa").

  • demands (dict[str, str]) – Map of demand label -> formatted value string. Examples: {"M_u": "200 kN·m", "V_u": "120 kN", "P_u": "+400 kN"}.

  • capacities (dict[str, str]) – Same format for capacities (φM_n, φV_n, φP_n).

  • dcrs (dict[str, float]) – Per-check DCR numerical values.

  • governing_dcr (float) – Worst (largest) DCR across all checks.

  • governing_check (str) – Label of which check produced governing_dcr.

  • passes (bool) – governing_dcr <= 1.0.

  • code_refs (list[str]) – Citation strings (e.g., "ACI 318-19 §22.2").

  • notes (str) – Free-text design notes / warnings.

Parameters:

  • member_tag (str)

  • member_type (str)

  • section_summary (str)

  • material_summary (str)

  • demands (dict)

  • capacities (dict)

  • dcrs (dict)

  • governing_dcr (float)

  • governing_check (str)

  • passes (bool)

  • code_refs (list)

  • notes (str)

member_tag: str
member_type: str
section_summary: str
material_summary: str
demands: dict
capacities: dict
dcrs: dict
governing_dcr: float = 0.0
governing_check: str = ''
passes: bool = True
code_refs: list
notes: str = ''
